description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 6, 2026 at 12:27 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on S. Centinela Avenue at Washington Place. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound on S. Centinela Avenue in the second from the right lane when it began to slow for a red 
light at the intersection with Washington Place. While the Waymo AV was slowing, a passenger car traveling northwestbound on S. 
Centinela Avenue in the same lane as the Waymo AV approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the passenger car made 
contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
